titleStmt.title: SII 19.413: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 413. (A.R. No. 335 of 1904.) KUḌUMIYĀMALAI, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE EAST WALL OF THE ROCK-CUT SHRINE, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE, MĒLAIKKŌYIL TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an endowment of a village Marudaṅguḍi for conducting the tiruchchennaḍai (service) of god Tirumūlaṭṭānattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ at Tirunalakkuṉṟam by Madirāntakaṉ Irukkuvēḷār alias Āchchaṉ Vikramakēsari. It has been suggested in the M.E.R. for 1908, para 90, that this donor might be the same as the chief Bhūti Vikramakēsari the builder of the Mūvarkōyil at Koḍumbāḷūr. This is evidently an inscription of Parāntaka I. (No. 65, Pud. Ins. Texts).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yā
ṇṭu 2 10 1Āvatu tirunalakkuṉṟattu
tirumulaṭṭāṉattu perumāṉaṭikaḷukku matirān
taka Irukkuveḷārāṉa Āccaṉ vikkiramakecariyā
r kuṭutta muṉainariyār marutaṅkuṭi tiruccen
naṭaikku mutalāka kuṭutta Ūr panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.413 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
